defect: missing load reactor on long motor leads
prompt: Diagnose the most likely fault or failure mode and explain what evidence supports it.
scenario: You are on a manufacturing or assembly floor running standard work with quality gates. The work under review is VFDs & motor controls, part of the Electrical scope. The observed field condition is: missing load reactor on long motor leads. The work is in service as an operating asset. Reference material on hand: NEC 430, mfr manuals.
title: Fault diagnosis: VFDs & motor controls (production floor)
